title: Adam Hobbs Resume
text:
Data Science Student
BYU-Idaho
LinkedIn | GitHub Portfolio


Brigham Young University–Idaho
Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science
Expected Graduation: [Add Graduation Date]
Relevant coursework:

Data Science
SQL and Databases
Calculus
Statistics
Machine Learning
Physics with Calculus




Programming Languages - Python - SQL - HTML/CSS
Tools and Technologies - Git - GitHub - VS Code - Quarto - MySQL - pandas - scikit-learn
Data Skills - data cleaning - exploratory data analysis - data visualization - storytelling with data - predictive modeling





Built and published a personal portfolio website using Quarto and GitHub Pages to showcase data science projects, technical skills, and professional growth.



Developed beginner machine learning models using Python and scikit-learn, including classification workflows, model evaluation, and feature analysis.



Created and queried relational databases using SQL, including filtering, grouping, joins, subqueries, and window functions.



Worked with raw datasets to clean, transform, analyze, and visualize data in ways that support better understanding and communication.

title: Adam Hobbs
text:
Hi, I’m Adam Hobbs, a Data Science student at BYU-Idaho with interests in data analysis, machine learning, storytelling with data, and full-stack development.
This portfolio highlights my growth across the data science workflow, including:

data cleansing
data exploration
story telling with data
machine learning
full-stack projects
competitions and applied work

I enjoy building projects that combine technical skills with creativity, communication, and real-world problem solving.

title: Adam Hobbs
text:

title: Adam Hobbs
text:
About Me
I am currently studying Data Science at BYU-Idaho and developing skills in:

Python
SQL
machine learning
data visualization
web development
Git and GitHub

I am especially interested in building meaningful projects that help people learn, solve problems, and make better decisions with data.

title: Adam Hobbs
text:
Featured Goals
Through this portfolio, I want to:

showcase my technical skills
demonstrate my growth over time
share projects I am proud of
create a professional online presence for future opportunities
